title: Adds Signature Room Architecture (7 zones) + UI/UX Spec (9 objects, 7 engines)
public_claim: "Hardened" in this package means something specific and different from RC1 and Execution_Archive: it is the package whose unique contribution is the room-design dossier pair — a Signature Room Architecture document and a UI/UX Tool-and-Engine Specification — that fill the gap between vNext world-design and actual implementation.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
